room.caption: [G5-3K] Every time you question video game water physics, Bob the Whale cries. Please be considerate.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sDashBoots image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You have regained your Air Dash!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=2830 instance_destroy()
